description: Address code review findings: fix personality split between local/cloud LLM, add template fallback to Telegram handler, add evolution engine absorbs to Telegram, extract duplicated prompt construction into a helper, and remove redundant getContextString() call.
steps: Add a systemPrompt parameter to MKCloudLLM::generateWithContext() so the caller can pass a unified prompt instead of using the hardcoded one.

Extract the prompt construction block into a helper function buildLLMPrompt(input, relevantFacts, history) in mk_entry.cpp to eliminate duplication between handle_natural_query and generate_ai_response.
In handle_natural_query, remove the redundant cloudHistory = getContextString() call and reuse the existing history variable.
In generate_ai_response (Telegram handler), add template fallback (conversationMode.generateResponse) if LLM + Genesis both fail.
In generate_ai_response (Telegram handler), add prometheus.absorb(), genesis.absorb(), and consciousnessEngine.absorb() for successful LLM responses.
Pass the unified system prompt to generateWithContext() from both call sites.
Verify build and all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: generateWithContext() accepts an optional systemPrompt override parameter
A single buildLLMPrompt helper function exists (no duplication)
The redundant getContextString() call is removed
Telegram handler has template fallback when LLM + Genesis fail
Telegram handler absorbs into prometheus, genesis, and consciousnessEngine
Both local and cloud LLM paths use the same personality/system prompt
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/MK_os-2/MK_OS && make clean && make' and confirm exit code 0
Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/MK_os-2/MK_OS && make test' and confirm all tests pass
